name: hive
explanation: Hive is a JMXFetch-only integration: the spec inherits `template: instances/jmx` and there is no Python check class (the package only re-exports `__version__`). Collection runs through JMXFetch against HiveServer2 / Hive Metastore JMX (default example port 8809). Per the procedure's JMXFetch shortcut and pattern D, host+port+user+password are needed in any production deployment, and JMX credentials cannot be derived from the wire. Classify as impossible.
notes: Pure JMXFetch integration like cassandra/tomcat/jboss_wildfly. Hive itself runs JMX over RMI, so even an unauthenticated localhost probe would not look like a generic /jmx HTTP servlet.
